description: Register a DuckDBPandasIOManager so assets are automatically stored in and loaded from a local DuckDB file

resource_key.label: Resource Key
resource_key.description: Dagster resource key for this IO manager. Use 'io_manager' to make it the default.

database.label: Database
database.description: Path to the DuckDB database file, e.g. 'data/warehouse.duckdb'

schema_name.label: Schema Name
schema_name.description: Schema within the DuckDB database for asset tables

quack_remote.label: Quack Remote
quack_remote.description: Optional Quack client mode. Format: 'quack:host' or 'quack:host:port'. When set, the IO manager routes all reads/writes through a remote Quack server (solves DuckDB's concurrent-write limitation).

quack_token.label: Quack Token
quack_token.description: Auth token for the remote Quack server. Use env-var reference: "{{ env('QUACK_TOKEN') }}".

quack_attach_as.label: Quack Attach As
quack_attach_as.description: Name under which the remote Quack database is ATTACHed.

quack_extension_repo.label: Quack Extension Repo
quack_extension_repo.description: Repo to install the 'quack' extension from. Use 'core_nightly' until the extension stabilizes.

name: DuckDB IO Manager
